title: Default 'Result Updated Since 6 Months' to Yes

requirements.text: Set the default value of the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" radio field to "Yes" when the app loads with no URL parameters (i.e., update the default inputs so this boolean is true by default).

quotes:
Result updated since 6 months 
Value will be yes by default

acceptanceCriteria: When the app is opened with no query string, the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" radio group renders with "Yes" selected.
Any "Reset" action that restores DEFAULT_INPUTS restores this field to "Yes" selected.

requirements.text: Update URL query parsing/encoding behavior for the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" field so that an explicit URL value of false (e.g., `res6y=false`) is respected even after the default becomes true, while keeping the existing query parameter name `res6y` unchanged.

quotes: Value will be yes by default

acceptanceCriteria: With `?res6y=false` in the URL (along with any other parameter that triggers parsing), the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" radio group renders with "No" selected.
With `?res6y=true` in the URL (along with any other parameter that triggers parsing), the radio group renders with "Yes" selected.
Shareable link generation continues to use the `res6y` parameter name and correctly encodes the current selection.

constraints: Do not modify read-only frontend paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.immutablePaths.
Keep the existing URL query parameter key `res6y` for backward compatibility.
nonGoals: Renaming the internal field `resultUpdatedSince6Years` to match the UI label text.
Changing validation rules or adding new calculation logic tied to this field.
